document.source_title: ‘Sanju Samson could be captain next year’: Brink-hit CSK urged to rethink Ruturaj Gaikwad after poor form
document.summary: Chennai Super Kings (CSK) are urged to reconsider their captaincy after Ruturaj Gaikwad's poor performance in IPL 2026. Former cricketer Manoj Tiwary highlighted Gaikwad's struggles, suggesting he should focus on building his own legacy rather than trying to fill MS Dhoni's shoes. With CSK's chances of playoff qualification dwindling, Tiwary proposed that Sanju Samson could be a suitable replacement as captain for the next season.
key_takeaways: Ruturaj Gaikwad's performance has been underwhelming this IPL season.
Manoj Tiwary suggests Gaikwad should focus on his own legacy.
CSK has struggled to qualify for playoffs under Gaikwad's captaincy.
Sanju Samson is considered a potential candidate for captaincy next season.
CSK has shown they can win without MS Dhoni.
Gaikwad's captaincy may be at risk due to poor team performance.
document.why_it_matters: The discussion around CSK's captaincy highlights the challenges faced by teams in maintaining performance and leadership continuity, especially in the wake of a legendary player's retirement. It reflects the strategic decisions teams must make to adapt and succeed in competitive leagues like the IPL.

claims.claim_text: Ruturaj Gaikwad's captaincy may no longer be safe.
claims.evidence_text: Tiwary reckoned Gaikwad’s captaincy may no longer be safe and suggested the management could hand the role to Samson.

claims.claim_text: Sanju Samson could be the captain next year.
claims.evidence_text: Tiwary suggested that Samson could be the skipper next year.
